name: Knights Vault
short_description: Knights Vault is simply a multiplayer Souls Like Platformer. Run, jump and dodge roll your way through many environments and obstacles while fighting other players in your lobby, only one knight will stand victorious vaulting their way to the grand treasure!
detailed_description: Knights Vault is a multiplayer Souls Like Platformer. Run, jump and dodge roll your way through many environments and obstacles while fighting other players in your lobby and hard core dungeon mobs, only one knight will stand victorious vaulting their way to the grand treasure! The game becomes harder and harder the more levels you complete! We we're inspired by old school platformers and wanted to put a souls like twist on one of our favorite game genres.
about_the_game: Knights Vault is a multiplayer Souls Like Platformer. Run, jump and dodge roll your way through many environments and obstacles while fighting other players in your lobby and hard core dungeon mobs, only one knight will stand victorious vaulting their way to the grand treasure!
